name: Sunday's Workout
description: 30 clean and jerks for time at a fixed barbell weight — the classic Girl WOD Grace, reused as the final event of the 2008 Games.
source_notes: games.crossfit.com/workouts/games/2008/1 (official CrossFit Games event, individual division confirmed), retrieved 2026-07-10; the classic Girl WOD Grace, reused as a Games event -- this was the final event of the 2008 Games
